prompt:
Subject: Walking in a Tokyo twilight alley
Person/Expression: woman in her early 20s, natural black to dark brown medium-length hair, natural bangs, translucent skin, modest Japanese makeup, calm profile, slightly pensive expression, gaze away from the camera
Clothing/Pose: Simple casual clothes blending into Japanese streets, dark tone inner wear and a light jacket, elegant and understated styling, hair naturally fluttering in the wind while walking through a crowd
Background/Light: Tokyo evening shopping district or alley, Japanese-style signs, blurred passers-by, depth of the city, golden hour backlighting, warm halo lighting the hair's outline, orange and amber light, soft shadows
Composition/Camera: Profile-oriented bust-up, rule of thirds, subject slightly to the right, 85mm-135mm telephoto lens, f1.8, shallow depth of field, background crowd with natural motion blur, strong subject separation
Texture/Style: Ultra-realistic, natural skin texture, every strand of hair shining in backlighting, movie scene-like texture, natural color grading, slight film grain, soft bloom, Japanese magazine snap style, editorial portrait
Negative: Western features, Korean idol-style makeup, flashy curled hair, revealing clothes, low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, strong subject blur, excessive skin smoothing, text, logo, watermark
